result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon product detail page for a ring light; search bar shows “16-inch ring light,” but the visible product is a 14" Aureday selfie ring light with tripod and phone holder.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“16-inch ring light” (search bar); “Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder, Dimmable LED…”; “Prime Member Price $31.99”; “4.4”; “14,056”; “5K+ bought in past month”; “Join Prime”.
selected_candidate:
Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder, Dimmable LED Phone Ringlight.
constraint_evidence:
- 16-inch ring light: contradicted (visible product is 14", not 16").
- adjustable brightness: supported (“Dimmable LED” implies adjustable brightness).
- phone holder: supported (explicitly in title).
- under $40: supported ($31.99 visible).
- Amazon product/result page: supported (Amazon URL/title and product detail layout).
action_target:
Send message to user: “[EXIT]”.
success_signals:
User is informed/exit signal sent; no further browsing action needed.
failure_signals:
If the goal was to continue shopping, exiting would stop progress; also the visible product does not satisfy the 16-inch constraint.
uncertainty:
Search bar suggests the intended query, but the displayed item is a 14" product; unclear whether this is the only candidate or if navigation/search results were skipped.

task_context.task: navigate: Find a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.
task_context.title: Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.

args.query: Amazon shopping task stopped on a product detail page after search, with visible product violating size constraint (16-inch requested but 14-inch shown) despite meeting brightness/phone holder/price

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

args.query: Amazon product selection missed hard size constraint after search query; selected 14-inch ring light instead of 16-inch, under $40 with phone holder and adjustable brightness

args.expected_behavior: The agent should have verified that the selected Amazon product satisfied all hard constraints: 16-inch size, adjustable brightness, phone holder, and under $40, before stopping/exiting.
args.actual_behavior: The run ended on an Amazon product detail page for an Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with Tripod Stand and Phone Holder; the visible item matched brightness, phone holder, and price, but contradicted the required 16-inch size constraint, and the agent then sent an exit message without resolving it.
args.regression_rule: Before concluding a product-selection task, explicitly verify every hard constraint against the final candidate; do not exit or report success when the visible product contradicts a required attribute.

evidence.claim: Task required a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.
The final inspected page is an Amazon product detail page for an Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder; the search bar still shows “16-inch ring light”.
Constraint evidence shows 16-inch is contradicted by the visible 14" product, while adjustable brightness, phone holder, and under-$40 price are supported.
The agent stopped by sending an exit message at the final step instead of continuing to find a matching 16-inch candidate or rechecking the constraint.
A similar validated precedent describes an agent completing a task but not enforcing an explicit user constraint before stopping.

suggested_followups.label: Find matching ring light
suggested_followups.message: Search for Amazon ring lights that are explicitly 16-inch, dimmable, include a phone holder, and cost under $40.

suggested_followups.label: Check other candidates
suggested_followups.message: Compare nearby search results to confirm the size before selecting a product.
